{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/2404584?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/geo-chen", "id": 2404584, "login": "geo-chen", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI0MDQ1ODQ=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/geo-chen", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47384", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-89", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')"}], "description": "### Summary
An authenticated user with column-create permission can inject SQL into the bulk groupBy
endpoint by setting a column's title to a SQL fragment.

### Details
The bulk groupBy path in `group-by.ts` builds three database-specific `knex.raw()`
aggregations that interpolate the request's `column_name` directly into the SQL string.
Column lookup in `data-table.service.ts` matches on both the sanitized `column_name`
field and the free-text `title`, so a title containing a SQL fragment bypasses the
public endpoint's existing column allowlist and reaches the query builder unescaped.

### Impact
SQL injection against the connected database with read access to any expression an
attacker can place in a column title. Exploitation requires an authenticated session
with permission to create or rename columns.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@geo-chen](https://github.com/geo-chen).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00306, "percentile": 0.22506}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-p8wx-5f39-w3x4", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:19:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p8wx-5f39-w3x4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-p8wx-5f39-w3x4"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47384"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:19:59Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-p8wx-5f39-w3x4", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.05.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-p8wx-5f39-w3x4"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-p8wx-5f39-w3x4", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: SQL Injection via Column Title in Bulk GroupBy", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T16:20:02Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-p8wx-5f39-w3x4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.05.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.05.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: SQL Injection via Column Title in Bulk GroupBy
